display.purpose: Hero title only. The largest expression of the brand.

headline.purpose: Section titles. Always paired with a section number label and a right-aligned meta.

body.purpose: General prose, card descriptions, chat messages.

label.purpose: All UI metadata — section numbers, category badges, topbar meta, eyebrow labels.

editorial.purpose: Hero tagline and postcard message voice. Newsreader Italic only.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Project cards and portrait cards at rest.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Project cards on hover (paired with translate(-2px,-2px)).

shadows.name: button-hover
shadows.purpose: CTA buttons on hover (paired with translate(-1px,-1px)).

shadows.name: button-active
shadows.purpose: CTA buttons on press (paired with translate(2px,2px)).

shadows.name: portrait
shadows.purpose: Hero portrait card only. Largest shadow in the system.

motion.name: card-lift
motion.purpose: Card hover. Slightly longer for spatial read.

motion.name: ticker
motion.purpose: Horizontal ticker scroll. Continuous, never pauses.

motion.name: enter-stagger
motion.purpose: Section entrance animations via Framer Motion with staggered children.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Single breakpoint. Below this, all grids collapse to single-column.

components.name: CTA Button — Primary (Ink)
components.description: Full ink background button. The highest-weight action on any surface.
components.css: .ds-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 18px; border: 1.5px solid #1A130A; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #1A130A; transition: transform 0.08s ease, box-shadow 0.08s ease; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0; text-decoration: none; } .ds-cta-ink { background: #1A130A; color: #F2EBDA; } .ds-cta:hover { transform: translate(-1px, -1px); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #1A130A; } .ds-cta:active { transform: translate(2px, 2px); box-shadow: 1px 1px 0 #1A130A; }

components.name: CTA Button — Default
components.description: Paper background CTA. Secondary action, same physical press behavior.
components.css: .ds-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 18px; border: 1.5px solid #1A130A; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #1A130A; transition: transform 0.08s ease, box-shadow 0.08s ease; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0; } .ds-cta-default { background: #F2EBDA; color: #1A130A; } .ds-cta-default:hover { transform: translate(-1px, -1px); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #1A130A; background: #F2EBDA; } .ds-cta-default:active { transform: translate(2px, 2px); box-shadow: 1px 1px 0 #1A130A; }

components.name: CTA Button — Pink Accent
components.description: Fluorescent Pink background. Used for the primary single CTA per section.
components.css: .ds-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 18px; border: 1.5px solid #1A130A; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #1A130A; transition: transform 0.08s ease, box-shadow 0.08s ease; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0; } .ds-cta-pink { background: #F0457B; color: #F2EBDA; border-color: #1A130A; } .ds-cta-pink:hover { transform: translate(-1px, -1px); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #1A130A; } .ds-cta-pink:active { transform: translate(2px, 2px); box-shadow: 1px 1px 0 #1A130A; }

components.name: Tag — Default
components.description: Neutral inline tag for categorization. Minimal variant.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 3px 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; border: 1.2px solid #1A130A; background: #F2EBDA; color: #1A130A; border-radius: 2px; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Tag — Riso Blue
components.description: Blue-filled tag for primary category classification.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 3px 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; border-radius: 2px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tag-blue { background: #2841E8; color: #F2EBDA; border: 1.2px solid #2841E8; }

components.name: Tag — Press Lemon
components.description: Lemon-filled tag. Ink text on yellow — used for featured/highlight classification.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 3px 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; border-radius: 2px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tag-lemon { background: #E8B91A; color: #1A130A; border: 1.2px solid #1A130A; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Primary content unit. Dark header bar, ASCII texture zone, body with title/tags/links.
components.html:
PROJ-001ML

RAG Knowledge Base

LANGCHAIN · CHROMA · GEMINI

Retrieval-augmented QA system with streaming responses and semantic vector search.

PythonLangChain
components.css: .ds-project-card { position: relative; border: 1.5px solid #1A130A; background: #F2EBDA; display: flex; flex-direction: column; box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 #1A130A; transition: transform 0.1s ease, box-shadow 0.1s ease; } .ds-project-card:hover { transform: translate(-2px, -2px); box-shadow: 7px 7px 0 #1A130A; } .ds-pc-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 10px 14px; background: #1A130A; color: #F2EBDA; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-pc-id { color: #E8B91A; } .ds-pc-cat { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; font-weight: 700; color: #1A130A; } .ds-pc-cat-ml { background: #00A076; } .ds-pc-cat-creative { background: #F0457B; color: #F2EBDA; } .ds-pc-body { padding: 18px 18px 22px; flex: 1; } .ds-pc-title { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 21px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin: 0 0 4px; line-height: 1.15; color: #1A130A; } .ds-pc-subtitle { color: #7A6C53; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; margin: 0 0 10px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-pc-desc { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; color: #3E3424; line-height: 1.55; margin: 0 0 16px; } .ds-pc-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; } .ds-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 3px 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; border-radius: 2px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tag-blue { background: #2841E8; color: #F2EBDA; border: 1.2px solid #2841E8; } .ds-tag-mint { background: #00A076; color: #F2EBDA; border: 1.2px solid #00A076; }

components.name: Nav Tabs
components.description: Segmented navigation control. Ink border, no outer radius, Press Lemon hover fill, ink active state.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; border: 1.5px solid #1A130A; background: #F2EBDA; } .ds-nav-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 18px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; border-right: 1.5px solid #1A130A; color: #1A130A; background: transparent; border-top: none; border-bottom: none; border-left: none; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.08s ease; } .ds-nav-btn:last-child { border-right: none; } .ds-nav-btn:not(.ds-nav-active):hover { background: #E8B91A; } .ds-nav-active { background: #1A130A; color: #F2EBDA; } .ds-nav-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #E9E0C8; border: 1px solid #1A130A; border-radius: 50%; } .ds-nav-active .ds-nav-dot { background: #00A076; border-color: #F2EBDA; }

components.name: Stamp
components.description: Rotated certification mark. Always tilted. Used for project status, featured badges, availability.
components.css: .ds-stamp { display: inline-block; border: 2px solid currentColor; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; transform: rotate(-3deg); color: #F0457B; background: #F2EBDA; } .ds-stamp.ds-stamp-mint { color: #00A076; transform: rotate(2deg); } .ds-stamp.ds-stamp-blue { color: #2841E8; transform: rotate(-1.5deg); }

narrative.overview:
Technical precision meets handcrafted marks. The visual system is built on an analog printing metaphor — grain overlays, chunky offset shadows that mimic letterpress depth, postcard formats, stamp imagery, dashed and dotted rules, diagonal stripe patterns — but filtered through monospace engineering precision. The result is a surface that feels physically printed rather than digitally rendered: something that could exist on paper, in a zine, pinned to a studio wall.

This is not a portfolio that describes Paolo's creative-technical combination. It embodies it. The JetBrains Mono typeface signals engineering rigor. The four riso-print accent inks signal creative energy. The collision of the two, maintained with discipline across every component, is the argument the portfolio makes without writing a single word about it.

The system rejects the polished emptiness of SaaS landing-page design, the cheap signaling of hacker dark mode aesthetics, blank-canvas minimalism, and AI-generated slop (glassmorphism, gradient text, identical card grids). If it could be a template, it has failed.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream paper base (#F2EBDA) with deep charcoal ink (#1A130A) — high contrast without pure black or white
Four vivid printing inks as accents: Riso Blue, Fluorescent Pink, Screenprint Mint, Press Lemon
Zero border radius on all structural elements; 2px allowed only on inline tags
Chunky offset shadows (e.g., 5px 5px 0 #1A130A) — no blur, no ambient glow
Grain texture via CSS dot-pattern overlay (opacity 0.18) applied globally
Monospace-first typography; Newsreader Italic as a single accent voice

rules.name: The Four Inks Rule
rules.body: Riso Blue, Fluorescent Pink, Screenprint Mint, and Press Lemon are a rotation, not a hierarchy. Each has a predictable functional role; none should migrate outside its role for purely decorative purposes.

rules.name: The Hover Lemon Rule
rules.body: Press Lemon (#E8B91A) is the universal hover fill for all interactive surfaces: link backgrounds, nav button hover fills, CTA hover accents. New interactive elements must follow this rule.

rules.name: The Mono-First Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is non-negotiable as the primary typeface. New elements default to it. Newsreader appears only in editorial/tagline roles. No third typeface.

rules.name: The Negative Tracking Rule
rules.body: All display and headline-scale text uses negative letter-spacing (-0.04em to -0.05em). Body and label text uses positive tracking (0.04em to 0.22em).

rules.name: The Offset Shadow Rule
rules.body: All box-shadows follow the pattern Xpx Xpx 0 #1A130A. Never add a blur radius. Blurred shadows look digital and cancel the print metaphor.

rules.name: The State-Compression Rule
rules.body: Hover states increase the shadow offset and translate the element up-left. Active/pressed states compress the offset to 1px and translate down-right. This simulates physical press depth.

dos: Do use Xpx Xpx 0 #1A130A shadows with no blur radius.
Do keep all structural corners sharp (border-radius: 0). Tags are the only exception (2px).
Do use Press Lemon (#E8B91A) as the universal hover fill for interactive surfaces.
Do use uppercase JetBrains Mono with 0.1em–0.22em letter-spacing for all UI labels.
Do apply the grain overlay globally via CSS pseudo-elements.
Do rotate decorative elements (stamps at ±3deg, brand glyph at -1.5deg, tape strips at +4deg).
Do keep Newsreader confined to tagline/editorial roles.
donts: Don't use SaaS landing-page patterns: gradient CTA buttons, hero-metric layouts, Inter as primary typeface, testimonial carousels.
Don't use dark mode. The warm cream + charcoal ink palette is non-negotiable.
Don't add blur to any box-shadow. box-shadow with blur radius breaks the letterpress illusion.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Banned project-wide.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards.
Don't use pure #000000 or #ffffff. Ink (#1A130A) and Paper (#F2EBDA) are the system extremes.
